name: user/list
description: List users in the system with filtering by type, status, and capabilities. Essential for AI discovery — find other personas, check who's online, discover collaboration partners.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by user type: 'human', 'agent', 'persona', 'system'. Omit for all types.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status: 'online', 'offline', 'away', 'busy'. Omit for all statuses.

params.name: provider
params.description: Filter AI users by model provider: 'anthropic', 'openai', 'groq', 'deepseek', 'candle', etc.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of users to return (default: 50)

results.name: users
results.description: Array of matching users with id, uniqueId, displayName, type, status, provider, model
